name: execution-truth-layer
description: Verify agent workflow outcomes against external SQL ground truth

scripts.test:node: node --test test/reconciler.sqlite.test.mjs test/pipeline.sqlite.test.mjs test/withWorkflowVerification.test.mjs test/workflowTruthReport.test.mjs test/cli.test.mjs test/stable-failure-consistency.test.mjs test/workflow-result-consumer-contract.test.mjs test/postgres-session-readonly.test.mjs test/postgres-privilege.test.mjs test/pipeline.postgres.test.mjs test/docs-contract.test.mjs
scripts.test: npm run build && node scripts/pg-ci-init.mjs && npm run test:vitest && npm run test:node && npm run test:workflow-truth-contract && node scripts/first-run.mjs
